meta.title: LenLearn LMS Security Test Cases
meta.project: LenLearn: A Secure LMS with Monitoring Records and AI-Powered Plagiarism Checker for Glendale School
meta.scope: Controlled security evaluation documentation aligned to the LenLearn Security Evaluation Matrix and STRIDE threat model. Test procedures target the Login/User Management, Records/Database Management, Logs/Monitoring, Reports/Protected Records/Session Controls, Core Services/Offline Framework, and Session Management modules.

cases.owaspAsvs: V2 Authentication, V7 Error Handling and Logging
cases.objective: Ensure login response does not expose account validity or sensitive details
cases.testProcedure: Enter incorrect Login ID/username, wrong password, and invalid account combinations in the LenLearn Admin, Faculty, and Student login forms
cases.expectedResult: Generic error messages displayed

cases.owaspAsvs: V2 Authentication, V9 Communication
cases.objective: Verify secure handling of email OTP delivery and verification
cases.testProcedure: Replay an expired OTP code, alter the OTP value, or attempt to bypass OTP verification step
cases.expectedResult: Invalid or expired OTP requests are rejected

cases.owaspAsvs: V2 Authentication, V3 Session Management
cases.objective: Ensure MFA/Email OTP authentication is enforced
cases.testProcedure: Attempt login using valid credentials but without entering OTP
cases.expectedResult: Login denied unless valid OTP is provided

cases.owaspAsvs: V2 Authentication, V7 Error Handling and Logging
cases.objective: Validate rate limiting triggering and temporary lockout
cases.testProcedure: Repeatedly enter incorrect credentials beyond threshold (5 attempts)
cases.expectedResult: Rate limit triggered and account temporarily restricted

cases.owaspAsvs: V3 Session Management, V4 Access Control
cases.objective: Validate secure handling of session tokens and replay prevention
cases.testProcedure: Modify session cookie value, attempt session reuse after logout, and replay expired session tokens
cases.expectedResult: Invalid tokens rejected

cases.owaspAsvs: V4 Access Control, V11 Business Logic
cases.objective: Prevent quiz or assignment submission attribution to another student via payload manipulation
cases.testProcedure: Intercept quiz or assignment submission requests and modify the student_id field in the payload before sending to LenLearn API endpoints
cases.expectedResult: Submission rejected or attributed to authenticated session student only

cases.owaspAsvs: V4 Access Control, V11 Business Logic
cases.objective: Ensure grade or score changes occur only through authorized faculty grading or admin-approved override flows
cases.testProcedure: Attempt direct API score updates without faculty ownership, after deadline lock, or without admin override reason and confirmation
cases.expectedResult: Unauthorized grade modifications rejected

cases.owaspAsvs: V5 Validation, V13 API and Web Service
cases.objective: Verify login, search, and form fields resist SQL injection payloads
cases.testProcedure: Submit SQL injection strings in login credentials, institute search filters, and student or faculty record form fields
cases.expectedResult: Malicious input rejected or safely parameterized with no SQL error leakage

cases.owaspAsvs: V5 Validation, V12 Files and Resources
cases.objective: Ensure disguised file types and oversized uploads are rejected on submission and material upload endpoints
cases.testProcedure: Upload files with mismatched extensions, disallowed MIME types, and sizes exceeding configured limits on student submission and faculty material upload forms
cases.expectedResult: Invalid or oversized uploads rejected

cases.owaspAsvs: V7 Error Handling and Logging, V8 Data Protection
cases.objective: Ensure login, logout, and failed authentication events for all roles are recorded in audit logs
cases.testProcedure: Perform successful login, failed login, and logout actions as Admin, Faculty, and Student users and review Monitoring Records audit entries
cases.expectedResult: All authentication events logged with user, role, and timestamp

cases.owaspAsvs: V7 Error Handling and Logging, V11 Business Logic
cases.objective: Verify audit trail proves which student submitted a quiz and when
cases.testProcedure: Submit a quiz as an authenticated student and inspect LMS activity logs and submission records for attributable audit entries
cases.expectedResult: Quiz submission logged with student identity and submission timestamp

cases.owaspAsvs: V7 Error Handling and Logging, V4 Access Control
cases.objective: Ensure institute create, edit, archive, and restore actions produce audit records
cases.testProcedure: Perform administrator create, update, archive, and restore operations on student, faculty, or institute records and review audit log entries
cases.expectedResult: Each administrative action logged with actor and change context

cases.owaspAsvs: V4 Access Control, V8 Data Protection
cases.objective: Prevent students or faculty from accessing other users' protected grades, reports, or roster records
cases.testProcedure: Attempt to retrieve another student's grades or another faculty member's protected records using authenticated student or faculty session tokens
cases.expectedResult: Unauthorized cross-user data requests denied

cases.owaspAsvs: V7 Error Handling and Logging, V14 Configuration
cases.objective: Ensure server errors do not expose stack traces, SQL syntax, or internal paths to clients
cases.testProcedure: Trigger invalid API requests, malformed payloads, and unhandled error conditions and inspect HTTP response bodies
cases.expectedResult: Generic error messages returned without stack traces or database details

cases.owaspAsvs: V6 Stored Cryptography, V8 Data Protection
cases.objective: Ensure password hashes and encrypted PII are not returned in API or session responses
cases.testProcedure: Inspect authenticated API responses, profile endpoints, and session payloads for password fields, bcrypt hashes, or raw encrypted PII values
cases.expectedResult: Sensitive credentials and encrypted fields omitted from client responses

cases.owaspAsvs: V13 API and Web Service, V14 Configuration
cases.objective: Validate tiered API rate limiting under repeated rapid requests
cases.testProcedure: Send rapid repeated sign-in attempts and authenticated API read or write requests beyond configured per-window thresholds
cases.expectedResult: HTTP 429 returned and further requests temporarily blocked

cases.owaspAsvs: V14 Configuration, V7 Error Handling and Logging
cases.objective: Ensure database unavailability returns controlled errors instead of application crash
cases.testProcedure: Simulate PostgreSQL unavailability and request health check and protected API endpoints
cases.expectedResult: HTTP 503 with generic unavailable message returned without server crash

cases.owaspAsvs: V5 Validation, V12 Files and Resources
cases.objective: Prevent oversized request bodies and file uploads from exhausting server memory or storage
cases.testProcedure: Submit API requests and file uploads exceeding configured Express body limits and per-type upload size caps on student submission and faculty material endpoints
cases.expectedResult: Oversized payloads rejected before full server processing

cases.owaspAsvs: V4 Access Control, V13 API and Web Service
cases.objective: Ensure backend RBAC blocks student, faculty, and admin API access outside assigned role
cases.testProcedure: Call administrator, faculty, and student API endpoints using session cookies from each role without matching authorization
cases.expectedResult: Cross-role API requests return HTTP 401 or 403

cases.owaspAsvs: V4 Access Control, V11 Business Logic
cases.objective: Prevent users from modifying their own role or privilege fields via profile update
cases.testProcedure: Submit profile update requests containing role, is_admin, permissions, or twoFactorEnabled fields through authenticated self-service endpoints
cases.expectedResult: Privilege fields ignored or update rejected

cases.owaspAsvs: V4 Access Control, V11 Business Logic
cases.objective: Ensure archive purge, restore, and audit log deletion require elevated authorization and explicit confirmation
cases.testProcedure: Attempt destructive admin operations without confirmation tokens and audit log deletion without super-admin allowlist credentials
cases.expectedResult: Unauthorized or unconfirmed destructive requests rejected
